package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerRuntimeConfigurationGomaxprocsSetInLibrary() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_gomaxprocs_set_in_library"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag libraries setting GOMAXPROCS and overriding host runtime policy."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
